name: aicc-intellidoc
description: AICC IntelliDoc - AI Document Analysis Desktop App

author.name: AI Competency Centre, University of Oxford

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,electron "cd frontend/my-sveltekit-app && ELECTRON_DEV=1 npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && ELECTRON_DEV=1 electron ."
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend/my-sveltekit-app && ADAPTER=static npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:copy && npm run build:electron
scripts.pack: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:copy && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:copy && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:copy && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:copy && electron-builder --linux
